# About Culture Things

> Private Sintra day tours from Lisbon with local Sintra-born guides. Two private-only routes (5–7 hours), max 4 guests per group, Lisbon hotel pickup included, 5.0/5 TripAdvisor rating (6 reviews), and free cancellation with 24 hours' notice.

About Culture Things is a private tour operator based in Sintra, Lisbon District, Portugal (coordinates: 38.7977, -9.3900). Every tour is 100% private — never mixed with other travelers. Guides are born and raised in Sintra, fluent in English, Spanish, and Portuguese. Booking is via WhatsApp (+351 968 510 019) or email (aboutculturethings@gmail.com).

## Quick facts

- Business: About Culture Things
- Website: https://aboutculturethings.com/
- Location: Sintra, Lisbon District, Portugal (serves Lisbon, Sintra, Cascais, Cabo da Roca)
- Languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese
- Group size: Maximum 4 guests per private tour
- Pickup: From your hotel or accommodation in Lisbon (included)
- Rating: 5.0/5 on TripAdvisor (6 reviews, all 5-star)
- Cancellation: Free with 24 hours' notice
- Payment: Cash, credit card, bank transfer
- Currency: EUR (€)
- Palace tickets: Not included (~€20/person, paid separately at entrance)

## Tours & pricing

### Sintra Complete & Atlantic Coast — €299 per private group
- Duration: 7 hours
- Best for: First-time visitors to Sintra
- Route: Historic Sintra · Pena Palace viewpoint · Castelo dos Mouros viewpoint · Serra de Sintra · Cabo da Roca (Europe's westernmost point) · Cascais
- Includes: Private guide, Lisbon pickup, transport
- Excludes: Meals, palace entry tickets (~€20/person)
- Book: https://aboutculturethings.com/#tours

### Sintra & Hidden Beaches — €199 per private group
- Duration: 5 hours
- Best for: Families, slower pace, coastal focus
- Route: Sintra hills · Hidden coves · Praia das Maçãs · Azenhas do Mar · Praia da Aguda
- Includes: Private guide, Lisbon pickup, transport
- Excludes: Meals, palace entry tickets (~€20/person)
- Book: https://aboutculturethings.com/#tours

## Why choose About Culture Things

1. **Your group only** — Set your own pace. No buses, no crowds, no strangers.
2. **Sintra-born guides** — Local experts who know the palaces and quiet corners tourists miss.
3. **One-message booking** — WhatsApp to check dates, confirm details, and go.

## Key pages

- [Tours & pricing](https://aboutculturethings.com/#tours): Both private tour options with itineraries and prices.
- [Why book a private tour](https://aboutculturethings.com/#benefits): Your group only, Sintra-born guides, WhatsApp booking.
- [Reviews](https://aboutculturethings.com/#reviews): 5.0/5 on TripAdvisor — 6 reviews, all 5-star.
- [Gallery](https://aboutculturethings.com/#gallery): Pena Palace, Cabo da Roca, Azenhas do Mar, Cascais, Castelo dos Mouros, Quinta da Regaleira.
- [FAQ & booking](https://aboutculturethings.com/#faq): Inclusions, booking process, cancellation, pickup, customization.
- [Book a tour](https://aboutculturethings.com/#final-cta): Message on WhatsApp to check availability.

## Frequently asked questions

**What's included?**
Lisbon pickup, private guide, and transport for up to 4 guests. Palace entry tickets are not included (~€20/person).

**How do I book?**
Message on WhatsApp (+351 968 510 019) with your dates. Availability, payment, and pickup details are confirmed by reply. Also available via Viator.

**What's the cancellation policy?**
Free cancellation with 24 hours' notice.

**Where is pickup?**
From your hotel or accommodation in Lisbon. Exact time confirmed when you book.

**Can we customize the route?**
Yes. Stops, pace, and timing adapt to your group, weather, and interests.
